title: MysticRift: BlockBusters DISCONTINUED
body:
STOP! Before you download, Read the text below.
 
The new version of Blockbusters is now available on Modrinth! watch it here:[MysticRift: Ultimate 400+ Blocks + create] [MysticRift: 400+ Blocks + create](https://modrinth.com/mod/mysticrift-ultimate-400+-blocks-+-create)

We do not support block busters anymore!

This mod adds 50+ new decorative blocks!
